CLERK'S NOTICE OF FILING OF NOTICE OF APPEAL

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT MARY OLSON MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES FOR AN ORDER THAT THE TRUTH OF MATTERS SET FORTH IN THE REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED. PERFECTION OF THE APPEAL BY FILING THE NOTICE OF APPEAL DEPRIVED THE TRIAL COURT OF SUBJECT MATTER JURISDICTION AND STAYED THE ACTION PER C.C.P. SECTION 916. APPEAL FROM AN ORDER DENYING ARBITRATION AFFECTS THE ENTIRE ACTION AND STAYS THE TRIAL COURT PROCEEDING. SEE VARIAN MEDICAL SYSTEMS, INC. V. DELFINO (2005) 35 CAL.4TH 180 AND PRUDENTIAL-BACHE SECURITIES, INC. V. SUPERIOR COURT (1988) 201 CAL.APP.3D 924. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS DENIED. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED. JUDGE PRO TEM: NILS ROSENQUEST; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (DISC302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion: (A) To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatiories, Set One; (B) To Compel Responses To Requests For Production Set One; (C) For An Order That The Truth Of Matters Set Forth In The Request For Admissions, Set One, Be Deemed Admitted; And (D) For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $2,315.00 Against Defendant And His Attorneys
Off Calendar Jul-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Edward Zusman, Esq. 415-438-4515 of Markun Zusman Freniere Compton LLP for Plaintiff.
Mitch Onu, Esq. 650-484-1038 for Defendant MARY OLSON through Court Call.

Both sides stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT MARY OLSON's Motion: (A) To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatiories, Set One; (B) To Compel Responses To Requests For Production Set One; (C) For An Order That The Truth Of Matters Set Forth In The Request For Admissions, Set One, Be Deemed Admitted; And (D) For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $2,315.00 Against Defendant And His Attorneys.

Taken Under Submission.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Continued To Jan-23-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses For An Order That The Truth Of Matters Set Forth In The Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-08-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Elliott M. Rector of the law offices of Markun Zusman Freniere Compton LLP (415-438-4515) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT MARY OLSON Motion To Compel Discovery Responses For An Order That The Truth Of Matters Set Forth In The Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions is denied. Perfection of the appeal by filing the Notice of Appeal deprived the trial court of subject matter jurisdiction and stayed the action per C.C.P. Section 916. Appeal from an order denying arbitration affects the entire action and stays the trial court proceeding. See Varian Medical Systems, Inc. v. Delfino (2005) 35 Cal.4th 180 and Prudential-Bache Securities, Inc. v. Superior Court (1988) 201 Cal.App.3d 924. Request for sanctions denied.

Written order is signed and filed.

Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (DISC302)
